title: crucianella divaricata
intro: Crucianella divaricata, also known as divaricated thyme, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in combination with other herbs in tinctures and salves.
